title: Marlea villosa

This classification places Marlea villosa within the order Apiales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the arum and myrrh families. The family Apiaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including Apioideae, which is one of the largest and most diverse subfamilies within the family. Marlea villosa is also classified as a flowering plant, with its exact classification varying depending on the source. Further research may be needed to determine the specific classification of Marlea villosa.
